title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US dominates AI chip and model development but faces structural disadvantages in power infrastructure for data centers compared to China. Political fragmentation across US jurisdictions creates slower decision-making and transmission barriers, while China's centralized approach and UHV grid enable rapid scaling. Big Tech companies are working around grid constraints through behind-the-meter power generation and off-grid solutions.
